name: Alpha DX Group Limited
summary: Alpha DX Group Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the exploration and production of oil and gas assets. The company focuses on the development of independently certified oil and gas assets of proven reserves, and proven and probable reserves. It holds 36.2% interest in the Mustang project, a prospective project in the Southern Miluveach Unit, which encompasses approximately 7,680 acres located in the North Slope oil productive region of Alaska, the United States. The company was formerly known as Alpha Energy Holdings Limited and changed its name to Alpha DX Group Limited in March 2021. Alpha DX Group Limited was founded in 1990 and is based in Singapore.
